dialogueChunks.intro: It's done, {player_name}. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} mine, and things will be better for it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council recognized my claim this morning. {target_npc} conceded after they saw the evidence and the support we'd gathered. The {enemy_type} threat is being addressed, supply lines are open, and decisions are being made instead of debated endlessly.
dialogueChunks.outro: You helped me earn this. Not just take it: earn it. Here's what I promised, and know that you'll always have an ally in power.

playerResponses.text: Use the power wisely. That's all I ask.
An ally in power is worth more than gold. I'll hold you to that.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I won't pretend the victory was clean. But it's mine.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The opposition crumbled after you dealt with their enforcers. {target_npc} left rather than face the assembly. Some call me ruthless, and maybe they're right. But the defenses are strengthened and the {enemy_type} haven't breached our perimeter since I took charge. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} secure.
dialogueChunks.outro: History remembers results, not methods. Here's your share of the results.

playerResponses.text: Results that protect people are results I can live with.
Just remember that fear is a poor foundation for loyalty.

dialogueChunks.intro: I pushed too far, {player_name}. I know that now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I got what I wanted: the {quest_focus}, the authority, the control. And it lasted three days before {target_npc} rallied enough support to force a shared council. I'm still at the table, but I'm not the only voice anymore. Part of me is furious. Another part is relieved. Leading alone was exhausting in ways I didn't expect.
dialogueChunks.outro: I learned something about ambition: having it isn't the sin. Letting it consume you is. Take this, and know I'm grateful for your honesty.

playerResponses.text: Shared power is still power. And it's more sustainable.
The fact that you can admit it means you'll be a better leader for it.
